response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with an impressive background in full-stack web development, CI/CD, and Dlang at top-tier companies, he fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development on Windows. His limited professional C++ experience dates back to a brief 7-month stint in 2014-2015. Furthermore, he has no direct experience in Fixed Income or heavy Capital Markets systems, making him an unsuitable fit for this highly specialized C++ role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) at top-tier tech companies like Google and Meta.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, test-driven development (TDD), and DevOps practices.
Demonstrated experience in the financial tech sector through previous work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience, having only 7 months of exposure in 2014-2015.
Missing required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development, SQL Server, or Oracle databases.
